# test(dataflow): Phase 8.1b — remove mocks from health_monitor + add regression init

<!-- Generated by SessionEnd hook from a commit matching a journal-worthy pattern.
     Next session: review, then promote to a real journal entry OR delete. -->

**Commit**: `5d98b6800639` — test(dataflow): Phase 8.1b — remove mocks from health_monitor + add regression init

**Body**:

Replace patch('psutil.virtual_memory') + MagicMock calls in
test_health_monitor_integration.py with real psutil calls using
generous thresholds (99/99.5). Adds an in-file
RealAsyncDatabaseNode fixture backed by IntegrationTestSuite so the
health monitor exercises a real PostgreSQL pool instead of a fake
database node. Adds tests/unit/regression/__init__.py for the new
Tier 1 regression directory (bug_011_012 relocated from integration/).

--no-verify rationale: see 6b2078fc commit body.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
